attrs.persona: a recent graduate living back home
attrs.register: long and rambling with run-on sentences

text: Okay so like, I haven't slept properly in weeks, seriously weeks. It’s just…waves. Like the ocean, but inside my head, and it’s always crashing. I keep trying to, you know, meditate or something, or read, or even just stare at the wall, but it’s pointless. My brain just…churns. It’s like all the thoughts I’ve ever had, all the stupid things I’ve ever worried about, all the things I *should* have done, are just all bouncing around in there, amplified a million times. And it’s always dark, even when the lights are on. Like I'm trapped under a really heavy blanket, a really, really dark one. Mom keeps asking if I’m okay, which is nice, I guess, but she doesn’t *get* it. She just says I need to “get out more” and “find a hobby” like it’s that simple. It’s not simple, okay? It’s not like I’m bored. It’s like…everything feels pointless. Like I spent four years studying for something that doesn’t even matter anymore, and now I'm just…stuck. Back here, in my childhood bedroom, staring at the ceiling. I feel like I'm just existing, not living. And the worst part is, I don’t even know *why* I'm feeling this way. It just…is. Like a constant, dull ache. I just wish it would stop. I wish I could just turn it off, you know? Just…not feel anything.  It’s exhausting.  Seriously exhausting.  I keep thinking about just...closing my eyes and not opening them again.  Not really sure what I'd do, just...not feeling.  It’s a weird, heavy feeling, like wading through mud.

okay so like this is probably a really bad time to post but i just… i don’t know anymore. i’m at the storage unit right now, loading everything into the truck. it’s freezing and the lights are flickering and it just feels… wrong. everything feels wrong. i’m moving to this tiny town, just a bunch of cornfields and a gas station, and it’s supposed to be a fresh start, right? a new beginning? but honestly i just feel like i’m burying myself under boxes of my old life and it’s not helping. i’ve packed up my whole apartment, every single thing, and it’s all just… stuff. things i don't even really want anymore. like, why am i even taking this with me? it’s just reminding me of everything that went wrong.

i keep thinking about how quiet it’s going to be. just me and the crickets. and the rain. and the endless, empty roads. it’s not a life, is it? it’s just… existing. i don’t even have a job lined up yet, just this temporary gig at the diner, and it’s going to be so lonely. i miss talking to people, even the grumpy guy at the coffee shop. i just… i don’t know how much more of this i can handle. i wish i could just disappear. not like, actually disappear, but just… cease to be. i’m so tired of feeling this way. it’s just a constant grayness, you know? like everything’s muted. i don’t want to wake up tomorrow. honestly. just… not tomorrow.

attrs.trigger: an anniversary of a hard event

text:
it's the anniversary today. the one where it all… happened. feels like yesterday, honestly. like i’m still standing in that rain, soaked to the bone and just… numb. i keep looking at Leo, my little guy, and he’s just… happy. cooing, grabbing at my hair, completely oblivious. and it just… crushes me. i know, i know, everyone says babies bring joy. and he *is* cute, he really is. but it's like a spotlight on everything awful. every mistake, every regret, every goddamn second of that day.

i don't even know why i’m typing this. it just… needs to be said, i guess. i feel like i’m drowning, constantly. and i try to keep it together for Leo, really i do. i force a smile, I sing stupid songs, I change diapers. but underneath it all, it’s just this heavy, aching void. a constant reminder. like a shadow that follows me everywhere. i just… don’t see a way out. i don’t want to be a bad mom. i don’t want to be a bad person. it’s just… so much. i just wish it would stop hurting so much. i just want to sleep. please, just let me sleep.

text: okay seriously, like, everything feels… gray lately. it’s not even like a sad gray, you know? it’s just… there. everything. it’s like the color was sucked out of the world and now it’s just this muted, vibrating nothingness. i haven’t slept properly in days, just staring at the flickering fluorescent lights at the warehouse, counting trucks and trying to make it feel like something real, but it doesn’t. it doesn’t feel real at all. he just… he just left. just like that. said he needed space, which is a fancy way of saying he didn't want me anymore. and i get it, i guess, logically, but it doesn’t *feel* like getting it. it feels like a hole ripped open in my chest and everything is just spilling out. i keep replaying everything, every stupid thing i said, every time i messed up, every time i wasn’t enough, and it’s just a loop, a horrible, endless loop. i keep thinking about how we used to watch the sunrise together, and now… now there’s just this endless, dark shift. i keep telling myself it’ll get better, that i’ll move on, that i’ll find someone new, but it feels like a lie. a really, really pathetic lie. i just… i don't know what to do anymore. the machines are humming, the boxes are stacking, and i'm just… here. just existing. and it’s not living. it’s just… being. and i don’t want to be anymore. it's just so exhausting, you know? trying to keep going when everything inside just wants to stop.

text: Okay, so like, this is… this is just a mess, you know? I don’t even know where to start. Lost my job last week, just… gone. They said “restructuring,” which is a fancy word for “we don’t want you anymore,” I guess. And honestly, it feels that way. Everything just feels… pointless. I haven't really talked to anyone, not really. My phone’s been on silent mostly, just this low hum, you know? Like it's vibrating with all the things I *should* be doing, all the people I *should* be talking to, but I just… can’t. It’s like a wall’s built up around me and it’s really thick and made of, like, gray sadness. I keep staring out the window at the rain, just watching it fall and fall and fall, and it feels… appropriate, somehow. Like the world is just weeping with me. I used to love the rain, remember that? Used to have a whole playlist for rainy days. Now it just reminds me of how empty everything is. It’s weird, because I’m not *sad* sad, not like… crying-until-you-can’t-breathe sad. It’s more like… numb. Just this heavy, dull ache that’s settled deep in my bones. I keep thinking about just… not getting up in the morning. Not bothering. Just letting it all just… fade away. It’s not that I *want* to die, not exactly, it's just... why even bother, you know? Like a broken machine, just gathering dust.  I keep replaying everything that went wrong, every mistake I ever made, and it's like a broken record.  I wish I could just rewind and... not.  I don’t even know why I’m writing this, probably just to prove to myself I'm still... here, somehow.

text: okay so like… everything is just… too much, you know? i don’t even know where to start. it’s been, like, a week since mark left and i just feel… hollow. it’s not even the *leaving* itself, it's everything that led up to it, and now that it's over, it’s just… quieter, but not in a good way. it’s just… empty. i went to the doctor yesterday because my chest started hurting, just a dull ache mostly, but it’s been happening more and more, especially when i’m stressed, which, like, is *always*. they did some tests and said it’s probably just anxiety, stress-induced muscle tension or something, but honestly, it feels like more than that. it feels like my whole body is just… shutting down. i keep thinking about how i used to be so full of energy, you know? always doing something, always busy, always trying to make things happen. now i just… lie here. the apartment is so big now, and it feels so empty, like he just walked out and took all the warmth with him. i keep staring at his side of the bed and just… wishing i could just disappear, you know? like, just fade away and not have to deal with any of this. it’s stupid, i guess, but sometimes i just picture just… not waking up. it wouldn’t be a big deal, would it? just… gone. i don’t know what i’m even saying, it’s just… a lot. and it's getting harder and harder to even breathe sometimes, like my chest is just a weight, crushing me. i just want it to stop. i just want it to stop hurting.

okay so like i don’t even know where to start i guess. it just feels… heavy. everything feels heavy. i’m back in my parents’ basement again which is, you know, not exactly a triumphant return to youth or anything. just… back. and it’s awful. i thought maybe being home would be a comfort, like a reset button or something but it’s just… everything reminds me of him. every song, every coffee shop we used to go to, even just the way the sunlight hits the kitchen table. it’s all just a constant, low-level ache.

he said it was over last night. just… over. like it was a text message or something. we were talking about grad school, and he said he didn't think i was serious enough, that i was just coasting. i know i wasn’t *perfectly* serious but i was trying! i was terrified of failing and now… now i just feel like i failed him. and myself.

i keep replaying everything in my head, trying to figure out where we went wrong but there’s nothing. it just… happened. and now i’m supposed to just pick up the pieces and pretend like everything’s okay. like i can just go back to applying for jobs and going to the gym and being a functional adult. it's not possible. it just isn't. i don’t even want to talk to anyone. my mom keeps asking if i’m eating enough which is the most unbelievably stupid question i’ve ever heard. like she doesn't even *get* it. i just… i don't want to be here anymore. it's just so much. so much sadness and confusion and this stupid, hollow feeling in my chest. i just want it to stop.

text: it’s… it’s the anniversary today. of everything. i know, stupid, right? like, a year since… well, you know. and i just… i don’t even know what to do. everyone’s posting happy anniversary pics with their partners, and little kids, and it just feels… sharp. like a knife. i’m not crying, just… processing, i guess? i don’t even know. i keep thinking about him, you know? about what it would have been like. if things hadn’t… gone wrong. and then i look at little Leo, who looks exactly like him, and it just… it just hits me all over again. i feel like i’m failing him, like i’m not honoring his memory, like i’m just… existing. i don’t feel like a mom. i feel like a ghost. i tried to talk to Sarah, my sister, but she just kept saying “you’re strong” and “he wouldn’t want you to be sad.” which, yeah, okay, i *know* that. but it doesn’t *feel* like that. it just feels like… a constant weight. a dull ache that never goes away. i just… i don’t want to be here anymore, maybe. i don't even know if i *can* be. i keep telling myself it'll get better, that Leo would want me to be happy, but it just… doesn’t feel real. idk. maybe it's just the exhaustion. or the grief. or everything all rolled into one big, messy ball. i just… i’m so tired.

text: I just… I don’t even know why I’m typing this out, honestly. It feels stupid, like shouting into a void, but I need to say *something*. Losing my job was bad enough, you know? Mom’s been on my back about everything, constantly criticizing my choices, saying I should have seen this coming, like it's *my* fault. And Dad… he just ignores me completely, like I’m not even here. It’s like every single thing I try to do, every single step I take, is met with some kind of judgment. I just feel… so heavy. Like I’m carrying this enormous weight and I don’t know how much longer I can just… keep going. It’s just getting harder and harder to breathe, you know?

text: okay so like… this is probably a really weird thing to post, and i don’t even know if anyone will read it, but i just… i need to say something i guess. i’m seriously struggling. it's the thesis deadline next week, you know? the one i've been stressing about for, like, six months? and it’s just… it’s not working. i've been staring at the screen for twelve hours straight yesterday and i still just have this huge, blank, awful mess. i keep deleting paragraphs, rewriting sections, and it just gets worse. my parents are, like, subtly hinting that i should be ‘productive’ and ‘finding a job’ and honestly, it’s just making me feel even more awful. i feel like such a failure. i just… idk how to finish it. maybe i should just drop out. i know, that’s a really dramatic thought, right? but it’s just… sitting here, looking at all the research, all the data, it just feels pointless. like i’m just going to be stuck here, failing, forever. i’m not sure what i even *want* to do anymore, you know? it's like every little thing just feels incredibly heavy. i'm just... tired. so, so tired. i keep thinking about just… not showing up. not doing anything. it's not even a concrete plan, just this… this overwhelming urge to just not. i just wish someone would tell me it’s going to be okay, but i honestly don't think it will be.

text:
Okay, so like, this is really hard to even type, honestly. I don’t even know *why* I’m doing this, but… everything just feels so heavy. It’s the shift, I think. Being up all night, watching the city sleep... it just amplifies everything, you know? The quiet. The emptiness. I keep staring at the security camera feeds and it’s like, everyone's having a life, a *real* life, and I’m just here, monitoring it.

And the money... ugh. It's just… circling. I’m working my butt off, 3rd shift again, the usual. But it’s never enough. I keep falling behind, even on the little stuff – the rent’s looming, and I’m pretty sure I’m gonna have to skip dinner again. I tried to get a second job, but my back’s been killing me and I just… can’t. It’s stupid, I know. Like, nobody *wants* a second job, but it’s this constant pressure. I just… maybe I should just not bother. Maybe it wouldn’t even matter. I don't know. It feels like I'm drowning in a pool of bills and exhaustion. I don't want to be a burden, but I don’t know how to fix this. Maybe if i just stopped showing up… maybe then they wouldn’t worry.  I don’t want to worry anyone. It's just... so much. I just wish it would stop being so loud.  I don't even want to get out of bed tomorrow. Seriously.  I just… I don't know what to do anymore.

text: okay so like, this is probably a dumb thing to even post but i just… i don’t know anymore. everyone else seems to be crushing it with their finals, you know? like, Liam’s acing everything and Maya’s already got her internship lined up. and me? i’m just drowning. i keep staring at my notes and it’s just… a blur. i might just skip the last two exams, honestly. idk if that’s the right thing to do, it feels wrong, but maybe it’s the *only* thing that would make it stop. i just feel this constant weight, you know? like if i don't just disappear for a little while, everything will keep crushing me. maybe it’s just exam season, maybe it's nothing, but it feels… really, really heavy.

it just feels… pointless honestly. like everything i did was for nothing. he said he needed space, which is code for ‘i found someone better’ right? yeah, probably. i keep replaying everything in my head like a broken record. stupid little things, big things, it doesn't matter. they all just lead back to this huge, empty space where he used to be. i don’t even know why i’m bothering to type this, i just… i just wish it would all just stop. like, just fade away. i feel like a ghost haunting a place that doesn't even belong to me anymore. i don’t want to do this to myself, i just… i just don't see the point in anything anymore. it’s all just so heavy.

text: okay seriously i dont get how other people just *do* this. like, everyone’s at these parties and they’re laughing and talking and it’s just…noise. a really loud, pointless noise. i tried to go to one last night, my roommate dragged me, said it would be good for me to “get out” but it was worse. everyone was talking about exams, about summer plans, about things i don't even want to think about. like i’m supposed to just…join in? i felt like i was watching a movie of everyone else’s lives and i was stuck behind a glass wall. i kept trying to make a joke, a stupid little comment about the music or something, but it just felt…wrong. everyone looked at me like i was an alien. and then i just started feeling this pressure in my chest, you know? like it was going to explode. i excused myself and went back to my room. i just wanted to disappear. it’s not that i don't want to *do* anything, it’s that i can’t even *face* doing anything. it’s like the thought of pretending to be okay, of forcing a smile, of having to interact with anyone…it's just too much. i keep thinking about just not going, just staying in my room and letting the world keep spinning without me. i don't want to be a burden. i just...i don’t know what to do anymore. it’s getting harder and harder to breathe sometimes, like there's this weight on my chest. i just want it to stop.

text: okay so like seriously i don't even know why i’m typing this but i just… i feel like i’m drowning and there’s no air and everyone’s just shouting and i can’t hear anything over it and it’s all just a blur of fluorescent lights and spreadsheets and this stupid report that’s due tomorrow morning and honestly i just don’t think i can do it. i’ve been up for like 48 hours straight fueled by lukewarm coffee and the desperate hope that if i just keep staring at the screen long enough it’ll magically fix itself. my head is pounding and i keep forgetting what i was even writing before and then i just start over again and again and again it’s like a record stuck on repeat of failure and self-doubt. my boss keeps sending little reminders about the deadline – “urgent” and “critical” and “needs immediate attention” – and it just makes it worse, like i’m failing on every level. i just want to disappear, you know? just fade into the wallpaper, become invisible. i keep thinking about just… not showing up. i know it sounds crazy but it’s not like a plan or anything, just this persistent, heavy feeling that it would be easier if i wasn’t here. i’m so tired of feeling this way, so tired of the pressure, so tired of everything. i just wish someone would tell me it’s okay to stop but i know they won’t, right? they’ll just keep saying “pull yourself together” and “you’re being dramatic” and it’s just… it’s too much. i’m just… so numb lately, like everything is gray and distant.

text: okay seriously i don’t even know why i’m typing this but i need to just… get it out. it’s just so heavy, you know? like this tiny little person, this perfect little baby, is just… demanding everything and i feel like i’m failing at everything else. i mean, i love him so much, i really do, he’s just… so beautiful and he smells like milk and baby powder and it’s supposed to be amazing but it’s also just… a constant reminder that i’m drowning. we’re barely making ends meet, the bills are piling up and my husband’s job is so unstable it’s terrifying. i keep staring at the bank account balance and it just… shrinks. it’s like it’s actively getting smaller, pulling us further down. i keep thinking about just… not being here, honestly. like it would be so much easier, wouldn’t it? less pressure, less worry, just… silence. i know that's awful to even think that, i truly do, but the guilt is so overwhelming sometimes it’s hard to breathe. i feel like i'm letting him down, letting everyone down. i just wanted to be a good mom, a good wife, you know? a normal person. but it feels like this role, this job, it's just too much. and i don't know how to fix it. i don’t know how to make it stop feeling like this crushing weight. i just… wish it would all just be over. i just want a little peace.

okay so like... this is probably a really weird thing to post, honestly. i don’t even know why i’m typing this out. i just... i needed to say *something*. i’m moving tomorrow. to this tiny apartment downtown. it’s supposed to be “better,” you know? a fresh start. everyone keeps saying that. but it just feels… heavy. like dragging a stone everywhere. i worked the night shift at the warehouse again last night, and it was just… gray. everything was gray. the machines, the boxes, even the fluorescent lights felt dull. i kept thinking about just… not going. you know? just staying here, in this job, in this familiar misery. it's easier, i think. i don’t know.

it’s just… everything feels so pointless. i’ve packed up my whole life, my entire existence, into boxes and shipped it off to a place i don’t even *want* to be. my mom keeps sending me pictures of the apartment, saying it has “potential.” potential for what? for more loneliness? more quiet? i don't even know what i’m doing anymore. i feel like a ghost, just going through the motions. maybe if i just… disappeared? i don’t mean like, dramatically. i just… maybe i wouldn’t have to deal with all of this. i don’t know. it’s just… a thought. a stupid, heavy thought. i’m probably overthinking everything, right? it’s just stress. probably. i just… i wish things were different. i wish i could just wake up and it all be gone. idk. i just… i don't want to be here anymore, maybe.

text: Just… ugh. Everything feels so gray here. Like someone turned down the saturation on the whole world. I moved here hoping for a fresh start, you know? To actually *feel* something besides this dull ache. But it’s just… me. And the rain. And the echoing silence of this apartment. I haven’t spoken to anyone real in days. Just random DMs. It’s exhausting trying to pretend I’m okay. Like, really exhausting. I keep looking out the window and just… wishing I wasn’t here. It’s stupid, I guess. But it’s there. This heavy feeling. Like I’m just a ghost in my own life.

okay seriously, I don't even know why I'm typing this. this whole thing is just... a mess. we moved like, three weeks ago and it’s been awful. I thought having baby Leo would be... you know, amazing. a fresh start, a little family. it's not. it’s just constant exhaustion and feeling like I'm failing at everything. everything I tried to do before Leo is just...gone. I used to write, I used to paint, I used to actually *do* things. now it’s just feeding, changing, crying. and the new apartment? it’s tiny and depressing and I can't afford to fix anything. it smells faintly of mildew and regret. my partner, Ben, he's trying, I know he is, but he doesn't understand. he keeps saying “it’ll get better,” but it doesn’t feel like it. it just feels…heavy. like I’m carrying this enormous weight everywhere I go. I look at Leo, at his little face, and I just… I don’t know. I just want it to stop. the feeling, the exhaustion, the crushing weight of just…being. I keep thinking about just… not waking up tomorrow. not having to deal with any of this. it's not that I don't love him, it’s just...everything feels so pointless. i just want to disappear. please just… let me be quiet for a while.

text: it’s just…so loud here. always. even when they’re not yelling, it’s like the walls are breathing. i miss mom’s voice, even when it was annoying. she always knew how to make things quiet, somehow. they don’t get it, you know? they think i’m being dramatic. they say i need to “get over it.” like it’s that simple. it’s not. it feels like…like being buried under a mountain of everything bad. i keep staring out the window at all those people walking by, pretending they don’t see me. i just want to disappear, honestly. just fade away and not have to deal with any of this anymore. i don’t know what to do. i just...don’t.

it’s just… so much. this deadline is eating me alive i swear. like a little bug constantly crawling under my skin. everyone else seems to be getting it done, breezing through, but i’m just stuck. staring at the screen, same paragraph over and over. i keep deleting everything. it’s pointless, i know, but i can’t stop. i just want it to be over. maybe if i just… didn’t wake up tomorrow. it wouldn’t be a problem then, would it? i don’t even want to finish the report, honestly. it doesn't matter. nothing does. i just feel so tired all the time, like my brain is full of lead. the fluorescent lights are making me sick. i just wish i could just... disappear.

it’s just… everything feels pointless now. she’s gone and i lost my job too. like the universe is just actively trying to make me disappear. i don’t even know why i’m bothering to type this. just… tired.

i just can’t do this anymore the deadline is tomorrow and i’m failing everything. it’s all just too much i don’t even want to open my laptop just staring at the screen makes me want to shut everything off completely.

seriously, i don't even know why i'm bothering to type this. it’s just… everything. Mom called again today. About *him*. About how he “didn’t deserve” me, how i was being dramatic and clinging to a ghost. Like, seriously? She never understood anything. Never. And Dad… he just sighs. Like i’m the problem. Like i’m the one who ruined everything. He just keeps saying “should have known better” and “you made your bed.” It's like he’s so proud of himself for being right, you know? For predicting this outcome. It's not a prediction, it's a reality. A horrible, gray reality that's just… stuck to me. I thought maybe if i just disappeared, if i just… wasn’t here, it would stop. But it won’t. It just keeps following me. Every text, every phone call, every stupid, pointless conversation. I just feel so utterly exhausted. Like i’ve been running a marathon for months and there’s no finish line. I keep picturing just… shutting it all off. Not like, permanently, but just… turning down the volume. Just fading away until it’s quiet. Is that pathetic? Probably. But honestly, it sounds… nice. Really nice. I don’t want to talk to anyone. I just want to disappear into the wallpaper. Just… gone.

text: it’s just…so quiet here. like, bone-deep quiet. mom keeps trying to make me eat more, says i’m wasting away, but honestly i don’t even feel hungry. just…empty. i used to hate coming back home after college, you know? i thought i’d be excited to see everyone, to be normal again. but now it's just worse. everyone’s got their lives, their jobs, their partners, their little routines. i just…watch. from the corner of the kitchen, scrolling through my phone, pretending to be interested in whatever aunt sue is talking about. she’s got a new cat, a ginger one, and it’s driving me insane. not because i hate cats, i don’t. it’s just…everything feels so loud and pointless. i finished my degree, i got a job, i’m supposed to be happy, right? but i just feel like i'm drowning and no one's throwing me a lifeline. i keep thinking about just…not answering the phone. not going outside. just staying in my room and letting the darkness creep in. it’s getting harder to get out of bed, honestly. like, the sheets are just…heavy. i don't even know why i'm typing this. it probably doesn't even matter. it’s just…a way to say it out loud, i guess. a way to feel like maybe, just maybe, someone else understands how completely lost i feel. i just wish i could feel something other than this…this hollow ache.

okay seriously i don’t know what to do anymore. it’s just… relentless. another late shift done, another ten bucks in tips which honestly barely covers the gas to get here. and the bills are piling up you know? rent’s due next week and i’m already behind. i keep telling myself it’s just temporary, that things will get better, but they don’t feel like they are. it’s like wading through mud, every step just heavier than the last. my boss, mark, he's a decent guy, i think, but he doesn’t understand. he just says “keep your head up” like it’s that simple. like i can just… switch it off.

i haven’t eaten a decent meal in days, just grabbing whatever’s cheapest at the corner store. and the loneliness… god, the loneliness. everyone else goes home, gets to see their families, their friends, their pets. i’m here, staring at flickering fluorescent lights, watching people walk by who seem to have everything figured out. it’s crushing. i just feel so utterly useless and trapped. i tried calling my sister, but she’s busy with her new job, you know? she says she’ll call back, but i doubt it. it’s always like that. i just… i don’t know why i even bother anymore. it's like this weight, this constant dull ache, just sitting in my chest. and it’s getting heavier and heavier. i just wish it would stop. i just wish… i don’t even want to finish that thought. it’s just… too much.

just packed everything up and drove hours. this new place feels so empty, like it’s swallowing me whole. i don't even know why i did this, just…everything feels too loud and wrong. i just want it to stop.

text: okay so like seriously i don't even know where to start because everything just feels…heavy you know? i just finished my degree, which is supposed to be a good thing right? everyone’s like “congratulations! you’re an adult now!” and i just…don’t feel it. it’s like all the pressure i’ve been carrying around for four years just kinda dumped onto me and now i’m just sitting here staring at my bedroom wall and it’s just…gray. i’m back at my parents’ house, which is…fine i guess, but it’s not *home*. it’s just…a place. and i’m stuck doing laundry and making dinner and watching my mom yell at the news and it’s just…it’s not enough. i keep thinking about all the things i *should* be doing, all the goals i had, and i just feel like i’m failing at everything. like i’m not good at anything. i used to be so sure of myself, you know? confident, driven… now i just feel…empty. and the worst part is i don’t even know *why*. there’s no big thing, no dramatic event, just…this constant, dull ache. it’s like my brain is just buzzing with static and i can’t turn it off. i keep wanting to just…disappear, i think. not like, dramatically, you know? just…fade away. it’s not like i have a plan or anything, it’s just…the thought keeps popping up and it’s getting harder and harder to ignore. i just wish things would just…stop. i don’t know what to do anymore.

text: okay so like seriously, this shift is just… it’s just not ending. i’ve been here since 11pm and it’s almost 6am and i feel like i’m dissolving into the fluorescent lights. it’s not even a *bad* shift, per se, just… relentless. Mrs. Henderson keeps needing help with her tablet, Mr. Davies wants to talk about his stamp collection again (seriously, stamps?!), and then the new intern, Liam, keeps asking me a million questions and he’s just so earnest and it’s overwhelming, you know? i keep trying to explain things but it just feels like i’m shouting into a void, and honestly, i don't even know if anyone *hears* me.  I keep thinking about failing this class, like, completely bombing the midterm, and then everything just… collapses.  It’s not even about the grade, it's about the pressure, the feeling that i’m constantly falling behind and everyone else is just gliding along effortlessly while i’m stuck wading through mud.  I just… I keep imagining just walking out, just quietly leaving and not looking back.  It’s not a plan, not really, just this constant, heavy feeling that maybe it would be easier if i just… wasn’t here anymore.  Like a switch flipping and everything just fades to gray.  I know it’s stupid, logically i know it’s not a solution, but when you’re this tired and this stressed and you just feel this… hollow, it’s hard to think straight, isn’t it?  Just… a really long, exhausting night.  I just want it to stop.  I just want to sleep, but even sleep feels like a burden right now.  Maybe if i just close my eyes really tight…

just... staring at the monitors again. everything is so gray. it’s getting harder to even feel anything, you know? like i'm just fading. i don't even know why anymore. just... tired.

text: it’s just… everything feels so empty now, like the air is gone and i’m just floating here, you know? i haven’t talked to anyone in days and i just keep staring at the walls, wishing i could just disappear completely, honestly, it’s getting harder to even breathe sometimes, like a weight…

attrs.persona: a person living alone in a new city
attrs.register: long and rambling with run-on sentences

text: okay so like seriously this is just… a lot. i moved here like three weeks ago, right? to this tiny apartment, all by myself, and it was supposed to be this fresh start, you know? a chance to reinvent myself and everything. but it’s just… heavier than i thought it would be. i keep looking at these buildings, all these people going about their lives, and i just feel like i’m watching a movie about someone else’s life. like i’m stuck behind glass. and everyone here seems to know each other, like they’ve been friends forever, and i’m just… new. a ghost. i went to a coffee shop today, just to, like, feel something, i guess, and it was so crowded and loud and everyone was laughing and i just wanted to disappear. i ordered a latte, and it tasted like ash, honestly. i keep thinking about my old apartment, even though it was falling apart, it felt…familiar. safe, in a weird way. here, everything is shiny and new and cold. i tried calling my mom, but i just couldn’t. it felt like i was burdening her with this whole mess, and she’d probably just tell me to “snap out of it,” which, like, is the worst thing anyone could say. i don't even know what i'm doing anymore, or where i'm going. honestly, i just feel… tired. perpetually, bone-deep tired. and the silence here is awful, it just amplifies everything. it’s like the walls are closing in, you know? i just want to go home, but home isn’t… home anymore. it’s just… gone. and i’m here, lost and alone and just… existing.

just... everything feels so heavy you know? lost my job last week, which was bad enough but then mom had a scare at the doctor yesterday. nothing serious thankfully but the worry is eating me alive. i keep staring at the walls and just… nothing. i don't even want to get out of bed. it’s like a gray fog has just settled over everything and i can’t shake it. my phone’s blowing up with texts from my sister asking if i’m okay but i just keep typing “fine” over and over. it feels stupid even saying it. i just... i don't know what to do anymore. it’s too much. i just want it to stop. i don’t even know why i'm writing this. it feels pointless but i needed to say something. just... numb.

everything feels so heavy lately like i’m drowning in baby stuff and exhaustion. i just... i don't know how much longer i can keep going. it’s not like anything specific happened it’s just... constant.
they just don’t get it do they? always yelling, always wrong. i just wanna disappear. like, just fade away. it’s too much, honestly. i don’t think i can do this anymore. just… quiet.

it’s 3am and i’m staring at the ceiling again. same as every night. the fluorescent lights in this warehouse are honestly the worst, they just… bleed into your brain, you know? and the shift is brutal, honestly. stacking boxes until my back feels like it’s going to snap. i haven’t slept properly in like, a week.  i keep thinking about how i’m just… useless. completely and utterly useless.  Mom said i should’ve gone to college, said i was smart. but college costs money, and i don’t *have* any money.  it's just this endless cycle, isn’t it?  work, eat ramen, work, eat ramen.  i tried to ask for help, called my sister, but she just kept saying “pull yourself together.”  Like it’s that easy.  Like i can just switch it off.  I'm so tired of being tired.  Everything feels so heavy, like i’m wading through mud.  I just wish… I wish it would just stop.  I keep picturing just walking out, leaving everything behind.  Not even a note, just… gone.  It's a stupid thought, i know, but it’s the only thing that feels… clear right now.  I don’t know what to do anymore.  Just... numb.  Really, really numb.  I just want to disappear, honestly.  Like a ghost.

attrs.register: long and rambling with run-on sentences

text: Okay seriously, like, everything feels pointless now, you know? It's just… gray. I keep staring at the walls and they don't even seem interesting anymore. Liam said it was "for the best," whatever that means, because apparently I was "too much" and he needed "space." Space? Like, he just vanished, just…gone. My apartment feels huge and empty and filled with all his things, his sweater, his toothbrush, the stupid coffee mug he always used. I keep expecting him to walk through the door, you know? Just to say, “Hey, sorry,” but he won’t. And I don’t even know why I’m bothering to write this, it’s probably just a waste of energy but… it’s hard to not just… not. It's just so heavy, this whole thing. Like I’m carrying a boulder and I can’t even see where it’s going.

attrs.register: hesitant, lots of qualifiers like "idk" and "maybe"

text: Ugh, just…everything feels so pointless now. I don’t even know why I’m bothering to post this, idk. It’s just…maybe if no one sees this, I’ll just…fade away? Like, slowly, you know? It's getting hard to even get out of bed, honestly.

attrs.register: hesitant, lots of qualifiers like "idk" and "maybe"

text:
Ugh, I just… I just don’t get how everyone else seems to just *do* social stuff. Like, I work the night shift, so I’m already operating on a completely different clock than everyone else, you know? And then, when I *do* manage to drag myself out, it’s like everyone's suddenly having the BEST time. Parties, dinners, hanging out, laughing... it’s just… a lot. I saw Liam post about his weekend last night, and it was just a blur of smiling faces and cocktails. I don't even know what a cocktail *is*, honestly. I just… feel like I’m always watching from the outside. Like I’m supposed to be *participating*, but I don't know how.

I tried to go to that open mic night at The Rusty Mug last week. It was… loud. And everyone was talking to each other, sharing stories, and… connecting. I just stood in the corner, nursing a water, and felt this huge wave of just, like, not belonging. I mumbled a “hi” to someone once, and they just looked right through me. Maybe I should just stop going out altogether. It’s probably for the best, isn’t it? Easier that way. I don’t want to bother people, or feel awkward. I just... I don't think I'm good at this whole being-a-person thing. It’s probably stupid to even think that, really. It’s just… tonight feels heavy. Like everything is just pressing down. I don't know what to do. Maybe I'll just stay in and watch the rain. It’s quiet, at least.

attrs.register: long and rambling with run-on sentences

text: okay so like, this is just… a lot, you know? I don’t even know where to start. it's been a blur, honestly, a really awful, exhausting blur. Liam is… he’s beautiful, he really is, and he’s perfect, tiny little hands and everything, but god, he cries. all the time. and it’s not like a cute, little-baby cry, it’s this… this raw, desperate sound that just rips through you and you feel like you’re failing already, before you’ve even done anything. my husband, Mark, he tries, I know he does, he helps with the feeds and the diaper changes and he says all the right things – “you’re doing great, you’re amazing” – but it doesn’t *feel* like it. he’s always working late, or he’s just… distant. like he’s watching me, observing me like I’m some kind of experiment. and I just feel so incredibly alone. I keep thinking about how much easier it would be, you know? just… not. to have him here. to not have this tiny, demanding human depending on me for everything. it’s not that I don’t love him, I really do, but the weight of it all is just crushing me. i feel like i'm drowning and i can't even scream for help because i don’t want to wake anyone up. i just want to sleep, just a long, quiet sleep where it all just stops. i don't know what to do anymore. i just… I don’t want to keep doing this.

attrs.register: long and rambling with run-on sentences

text: okay so like seriously everything is just... too much. I feel like I’m drowning and no one’s even noticed. This part-time job at the cafe is a disaster, Mr. Henderson is constantly breathing down my neck about the till discrepancies – even though I’m pretty sure it’s just him messing with me, he always has this look, you know? and then school, don’t even get me started. Mrs. Davies assigned us this huge project on the French Revolution and I literally have no idea where to even begin, like, I’ve read a couple of Wikipedia pages but it’s just a jumble of dates and names and battles and I just keep feeling this crushing weight in my chest every time I try to think about it. Everyone else seems to get it, they’re already making timelines and stuff, and I’m just sitting here staring at a blank sheet of paper. It’s like I’m failing at everything, and I just… I don’t know what to do anymore. I keep thinking about just, like, not going. Just skipping school tomorrow, or maybe even the day after. It wouldn’t be the end of the world, would it? Just… a little break, a little quiet. It’s just so hard to breathe sometimes, like there’s this thick fog in my head and everything feels muffled and distant and I just want to disappear, you know? Like maybe if I just wasn't here, things would be easier, even if it’s just for a little while. I just wish someone would understand, but I don’t even really know how to explain it. It’s not even angry, it’s just… this constant, heavy feeling of wanting to just… stop.

okay seriously, I don’t know how much more of this I can take. I just… I just feel like I’m drowning. Everyone keeps saying “it gets better” and “you’re doing great” but it doesn’t. It doesn’t feel like anything is getting better. This new job is a total disaster. My boss is breathing down my neck about deadlines, and honestly, I can’t even focus. Liam, my kid, he’s… he’s demanding. Constantly. I feel like I’m failing at everything. Like I’m a terrible mom, a terrible employee, a terrible person. I keep staring at him, at his perfect little face, and just… I want to scream. I just want it to stop. I keep thinking about just… not answering the phone. Not showing up. Just disappearing. Like if I disappear, maybe he’ll be okay. Maybe then I won't be such a mess. I know that’s stupid, obviously, but it’s the only thing I can think of right now. It’s just so heavy, this weight. Like I’m carrying the entire world on my shoulders and it’s crushing me. I just want a moment of peace. A single, quiet moment. But there isn’t one. There never is.

attrs.register: hesitant, lots of qualifiers like "idk" and "maybe"

text: Ugh, just... everyone seems to be having so much fun. Like, I don't even know how to *do* fun anymore. Maybe it’s better if I just didn’t show up to anything. idk, it’s just… exhausting.  Maybe just staying home would be easier, you know?

text: I don’t even know what to do anymore. Everyone else is out there, you know? Just…laughing and doing things. I feel so utterly alone with little Elara. Maybe it would be easier if I wasn’t here, idk. Just…a quiet space, maybe?

attrs.register: long and rambling with run-on sentences

text: okay so like seriously, this is just… a mess. it’s 3:17 am and i haven’t slept properly in, i don’t even know, a week? maybe longer. it just keeps spiraling, you know? i used to be able to fall asleep pretty easily, i'd just kinda…drift, but now it’s this constant, buzzing anxiety. i keep thinking about everything, every stupid thing i’ve ever done wrong, every time i messed up, every time someone probably judged me. and then i try to sleep and it’s just a replay of all those thoughts, amplified, like a broken record stuck on repeat. i keep setting alarms for like, six hours later just to check the time, and then i just lie there staring at the ceiling, watching the shadows move and feeling like i’m slowly dissolving into them. it’s getting harder and harder to even get out of bed, honestly. i just want to stay here, in this dark room, wrapped up in the blankets, just… disappear, i guess? it’s not like anything *happens* during the day, not really. just… going through the motions, nodding and smiling when people talk to me, but it doesn't *feel* like anything. like i’m watching a movie of my own life and i’m just a ghost in it. i feel so disconnected from everything, from everyone. my mom keeps calling, asking if i’m okay, and i just… i just can't even talk to her, not really. it’s like there’s a wall between us, and it’s getting thicker every day. i just wish it would stop. i wish i could just… be okay.  i just feel so heavy, like i’m carrying this enormous weight on my chest and it’s crushing me, and i don't know how much longer i can just keep going like this.

It’s so quiet, and I just keep thinking about how pointless it all is, like why even bother going on if this is all that’s waiting for me, just this slow fade.

text: just… everything feels so pointless lately, you know? like a really bad song on repeat, stuck in my head and i can't turn it off. i don't even know why i’m bothering to write this, honestly, it’s just… heavy. i guess i just want it to stop, the feeling, the everything.

Just... everything is too much. He left, the job's on the line, and this stupid history paper is due tomorrow. Seriously, it’s like the universe is just actively trying to crush me. I keep staring at the blank page and it’s just… white. Like my brain. I don’t even care about the grade, I just… I don’t want to deal with any of it. It would be so easy to just not wake up, you know? Like, maybe if I just didn’t bother, it’d all just… stop. I hate this. I hate everything. Just need to get through this one thing, I guess. But honestly, what’s the point anymore?

attrs.trigger: an anniversary of a hard event
attrs.register: long and rambling with run-on sentences

text: It’s… it’s the anniversary today. Ten years. Feels like a lifetime ago, but also like yesterday when everything just… shattered. I just keep going, you know? Just shuffling through the days, trying to keep everything together for him, but honestly, sometimes I just feel so utterly, hopelessly empty and like maybe it would just be easier to… not.

okay seriously i don’t even know where to start this is just… so much. it’s like a constant weight pressing down on me you know? i’ve been working like crazy at this marketing job it’s good, like, actually good and i’m supposed to be building my career and stuff but it’s not helping. not at all. i’m drowning in student loans and rent is due and the electricity bill is already late and i just… i don’t have anything left. i keep telling myself to just budget better, cut back on takeout, you know? but it’s not that simple. it’s like the money just disappears. it’s gone before i even realize it.

my parents are so annoying about it too always saying “you should have chosen a more practical major” or “you’re not trying hard enough” like i haven’t been trying my whole life. they don't get it. they don't get that sometimes you just… stumble and you can’t catch yourself. it feels like everyone else is moving forward and i’m just stuck spinning in circles. i keep thinking about just disappearing. just walking away and not coming back. it’s not like i’m actively planning anything just… the thought is always there. a dull ache that just won’t go away. i just wish it would stop. i just want to be somewhere quiet where no one can bother me. maybe then it would feel a little less heavy. i don’t know. i’m so tired. so incredibly tired of this feeling.

Just... everything feels pointless now. Like wading through mud. She's gone, obviously, and I lost my job last week. Both at the same time feels like a cosmic joke, you know? I keep staring at the ceiling and just... wishing it would all just stop. Like, maybe if I just didn't wake up tomorrow, it wouldn't hurt so much. My mom keeps saying “it gets better,” but it doesn't feel like it. It just feels heavy. Really, really heavy. I don’t even know why I’m typing this. Just... a lot. A huge, awful, empty a lot.

attrs.register: hesitant, lots of qualifiers like "idk" and "maybe"

text: Ugh, this deadline is just… crushing me, you know? Like, I totally bombed that last quiz and now Professor Elmsworth is saying this final is, like, 60% of my grade. I don’t even know where to start. I’ve been just staring at my laptop screen all day, and it’s just…mocking me, I think? Maybe I should just, idk, not even bother? It would be so much easier if I didn't have to do anything. I keep thinking about just…not showing up. It's probably stupid, right? Everyone else seems to be getting it together, or at least pretending to. I just feel so useless and heavy. I don't know what I’m doing wrong. Maybe if I just sleep for a really long time…

okay seriously this is just… too much. i keep staring at the screen and it’s just a blur. like everything is a blur. i was supposed to finish this project proposal like, yesterday but it’s due monday and i haven’t even really started. they said it was ‘urgent’ and ‘critical’ and now i feel like i’m drowning. it’s stupid though right? it’s just a stupid project. but it’s not *just* a stupid project, is it? it’s like, the only thing keeping me from just… disappearing. i lost my job last month, you know? didn’t even get a proper goodbye, just an email saying “restructuring.” restructuring my life into a pile of rubble i guess. and now this. this deadline. it’s like everything is piling up and i can’t even lift a finger. i keep thinking about just skipping it. just not showing up. would they even notice? probably not. they’re busy. they don’t care. maybe they’re right. maybe i don’t deserve anything. it doesn't even matter if i do or not, does it? i just... i don't know how to do any of this. i just want it to stop. the pressure. the feeling of being completely useless and adrift. i just want to be quiet. really quiet. and maybe… maybe it would be nice if it never woke up again.
i just wish it would all stop like, everything hurts and i don’t know how to make it not hurt anymore. just... tired. so so tired of feeling this way.

okay seriously, this is it. i'm just…done. like, completely, utterly done. they said it would be easier after, you know, the divorce. they said i’d be free, light, like a bird. it's been six months and i feel heavier than ever. i’m drowning in paperwork for this stupid accounting class, and my boss is breathing down my neck about quarterly reports. it’s just…constant. it's always something. like, i haven’t slept properly in weeks, just tossing and turning, replaying everything that went wrong with him, replaying all the mistakes i made. and it’s not even about *him*, it's about the pressure. the feeling that i'm failing at everything. at being an adult, at being a student, at being…anything.

i keep thinking about just…walking away. just disappearing. not answering my phone, not showing up to class, just…gone. it wouldn't be dramatic, not really. nobody would even notice for a while, probably. and honestly, i don't even care if they do. i just want the noise to stop. the constant feeling of needing to be *productive*, of needing to *do* something, of needing to prove i’m still worth something. it’s exhausting. i just want to curl up in a ball and not feel anything. i don't want to wake up tomorrow. it’s just…too much. everything feels pointless.

attrs.persona: a university student in exam season

text: Ugh, seriously, this is it. Just…can’t. Everything is piling up and I’m drowning. Professors are breathing down my neck about these exams, and my shift at the cafe is insane – people are just *demanding* everything. I keep messing up, even when I’m trying my best. It’s like the harder I try, the worse it gets. I keep staring at the ceiling at night, just…empty. Like there’s nothing left. I don’t even want to get out of bed. It's just a blur of textbooks and screaming. I wish it would just…stop. Like, just end. Don't even get me started on how tired I am. I just want to disappear, honestly.

text: Okay seriously, I can’t do this. Like, at all. This whole moving thing was a mistake. Everything is just… too much. The new place is tiny, and I keep tripping over boxes. And the exams? They’re breathing down my neck. It’s like I’m drowning, you know? Just… sinking. I keep staring out the window and thinking about just not opening it. Not getting up. It wouldn’t be a big deal, would it? Just… quiet. Everyone says “new beginnings” but this feels like the end of everything. I don't even know why I'm bothering to type this. It probably won't change anything. Just… tired. So, so tired.

text: okay so like seriously everyone else seems to be handling this exam season okay, posting about study groups and feeling productive and i just… i feel like i’m drowning honestly. it’s the history paper due next week, the one i’ve been putting off for, like, three weeks now and it’s just…massive. i started it, i really did, and i wrote a whole introduction and then i just stared at the blank page for hours and hours and hours. it’s just a giant, swirling mess in my head and i can’t seem to pull anything coherent out of it. my roommate’s already gone to a concert with their friends and i feel this weird pang of… not jealousy exactly, but like everyone else has a life and a purpose and i’m just… stuck. i keep thinking about just emailing my professor and saying i can’t do it, that i’m just not capable, it would be so much easier, wouldn’t it? i don’t even want to open my laptop sometimes, it’s just a reminder of everything i haven’t done and everything i’m failing at. i keep telling myself it’ll get better, that i’ll pull an all-nighter and somehow manage, but it doesn’t feel like it. it just feels… heavy. like i’m carrying this weight around everywhere and it's crushing me. i just wish it would all stop, you know? like just fade away. i don’t know what i’m even saying, i just… i just feel so tired.

attrs.register: long and rambling with run-on sentences

text: okay so like seriously everything is just… wrong. I moved to Oakhaven last week, remember? The one place I was so excited about, you know, the ‘fresh start’ thing? It’s just…grey. Everything is grey. The buildings, the sky, even the people seem to have a permanent layer of grey over them. And it’s not even a nice grey, it’s like…a sad grey. Like the sky before a really bad storm, you know? My apartment is tiny and overpriced and the walls are paper thin, I can hear my neighbor practicing the violin at like 6am which is just...awful. I unpacked everything, I really did, I swear I did, but it doesn’t *feel* like anything. It’s just stuff. Just boxes and furniture and this awful beige rug I couldn't return. I keep thinking about how stupid I was to think this would fix anything, you know? I thought if I just changed my scenery, if I just got away from everything…it hasn’t helped at all. It’s made everything worse, actually. I just… I don’t know what to do anymore. I feel like I’m drowning in this new place and there’s no one to reach out to, no one who even understands what it's like to feel this heavy. I keep imagining just…closing the blinds and not opening them again, just letting the grey in and not fighting it. It’s just…so quiet here, too. Too quiet. Like the world is holding its breath. And I'm just…waiting for something to break.

everything feels so pointless now. lost my job and the doctor said… i don’t even want to talk about it. just… tired of feeling like this heavy weight. i don’t see a way out honestly. it’s just… too much.

text: Okay, so this is probably a stupid thing to post, but… I just feel so completely invisible, you know? Like, everyone’s asleep, or gone out, or just… not here. It’s just me and the fluorescent lights again. I work the night shift, and it’s… it's awful. I try to reply to some messages, but most people don’t even respond. I don’t even know why I bother sometimes. Maybe it’s just the quiet, that’s the worst part. It’s so quiet. I dunno, maybe if I just… stopped answering, nobody would bother looking for me. It’s probably silly, I'm probably overthinking everything, but like… it just feels easier to just not be. I don’t even want to go home tonight, tbh.

text: it's… it’s october 27th. three years. three years since it all just… shattered. i moved here, you know? to Veridia. thought it would be a fresh start, a blank slate, like everyone says you should do when you’re trying to escape. but it’s just… louder. everything’s louder. the rain sounds like a constant, accusing whisper, and the city lights just feel like they’re mocking me. i keep expecting to see her, you know? just a glimpse, a flash of red hair in the crowd, and then… then i’d just… crumble. it’s stupid, i guess, clinging to these ghosts. but it’s all i have left, really. just the memory of her laugh, the way she used to curl up with a book and ignore everything else. i tried calling her yesterday, just to… to hear her voice, i don’t even know. the automated message just kept repeating, “your call could not be completed. please try again later.” later. what’s the point of later when there’s no ‘then’? i feel like i’m drowning, slowly, silently. the water’s just… grey. and i don't even know how to swim anymore. honestly, i don't even know what to do. the apartment is so empty. just… echoing. i keep staring out the window, watching people go about their lives, and it just feels like i’m watching a movie about someone else’s happiness. a really, really sad movie. i just… i wish it would all just stop. like, just… end. not a dramatic thing, just… quiet.  i don't want to bother anyone.

attrs.register: hesitant, lots of qualifiers like "idk" and "maybe"

text:
Okay, so like, this is really hard to even type, but… I just don’t know what to do anymore. It's 3:17 AM and I’m on my break at the warehouse, staring at the rain, and it just feels… heavy. My mom’s been yelling nonstop for weeks, ever since… well, ever since I said I couldn’t come to Thanksgiving. She says I’m being disrespectful, that I don’t care about the family, and honestly, part of me kind of believes her. I just… I needed space. It’s always been so loud, so full of expectations, and I just… cracked. It wasn’t a dramatic thing, it was just… a lot.

And my brother, Liam, he’s just… silent. He texts me sometimes, like, once a week, usually just "wyd?" and I don't really respond. I don’t want to talk about it, I just… don’t. I feel like I'm failing at everything. I’m failing as a son, failing at my job (I keep making little mistakes, stupid ones, and it makes me feel so useless), and failing at being… a person, I guess? I just want to disappear, you know? Maybe if I just wasn’t here, she wouldn't be so angry. It's probably stupid, right? Like, a really, really stupid thing to think. I just… I don't want to be a burden anymore. I don’t even know *why* I'm even bothering to write this. It probably won't change anything. It just feels… better to get it out, even if it’s just into the void. I dunno, maybe I'm overreacting. Maybe I'll just go back to counting boxes. Ugh.

attrs.trigger: an anniversary of a hard event

text:
it’s… it’s the anniversary today. of when everything just… shattered. feels like a lifetime ago but also like it was yesterday. i keep replaying it in my head you know? like a broken record. i didn’t even bother setting an alarm, just kinda woke up and it’s here. everything feels gray. like the picture on my phone but even duller. i haven’t talked to anyone really. mom called, but i just said i was fine. i don’t want to burden her. she’s already carrying enough. honestly, i don't even know what to say. it's just… heavy. like a stone in my chest.

and now i’m jobless too. another thing just gone. it’s like the universe is just actively trying to make me miserable. i keep looking at my bank account and it's just… disappearing. it’s not even a big amount, like, a few hundred bucks, but it’s the principle of it. it’s like i’m just slowly bleeding out. i keep thinking about how pointless it all is. all the striving, all the hoping, all the trying… it’s just… pointless. i don't even remember why i did any of it. maybe it was stupid to begin with. i don't know. i just… i just wish it would all just stop. like turn off. i don’t want to keep feeling this. it’s just… so much. i just want to be quiet. really quiet.
This baby’s breathing machine… it just feels like one more thing failing. Like everything is failing. I don’t know how much longer I can do this. Just…so tired.

attrs.register: long and rambling with run-on sentences

text: okay so like seriously this is the worst thing that’s ever happened to me and i don’t even know why it’s hitting me so hard but it is. we’re moving. like, *really* moving. to this tiny town called Oakhaven, it’s not even on the map properly, it just…exists. my dad got a job, supposedly, a ‘big opportunity’ but it’s just…dust. everything feels like dust. i’ve known everyone at school for, like, forever and now i’m just going to disappear, like a ghost or something. i tried to say goodbye to Liam, he just stared at me and then went back to playing with his drone, like i wasn’t even there. and Chloe, she didn’t even look up from her phone. it’s just…empty. i keep picturing my room, my posters, my ridiculous collection of enamel pins, and it’s all going to be packed up and shipped off somewhere. it’s not *my* somewhere. it’s just…a place. a boring, grey, small town place. i keep thinking about just not going. just staying behind and letting them think i’d left, letting them forget about me. it wouldn’t be a big deal, would it? just…quiet. and maybe then i wouldn’t have to feel this constant, heavy feeling in my chest. it's just...so much easier to not be here, you know? like, a switch just flips and everything is suddenly just...too much. i don't even know how to make new friends, i’m terrible at that, i always just mumble and blush and then they all talk about things i don’t understand. i just want to go back to how it was, even if it wasn’t perfect. i just… i don’t want to be here anymore.

it’s just… so much. mom keeps saying i’m failing at being an adult, that i should just move back home. like i haven’t been working my ass off trying to make something of myself. she doesn’t get it, she never does. and dad just sighs and doesn’t say anything, like he’s already decided i’m a disappointment. i just… i feel so trapped. everyone expects me to be okay, to just pull myself together, but it feels impossible. i keep staring at my reflection and i just don't see myself anymore. it's like a dark fog, everything is just gray and heavy. i don't know how much longer i can keep pretending. i just want it to stop.

attrs.persona: a recent graduate living back home

text:
okay seriously i don't even know what to do anymore like everyone keeps saying "it's a fresh start" but it just feels... heavy. i moved like three weeks ago you know? to this tiny apartment in this town i've never been to before. it's supposed to be good for me right? get away from everything and just... breathe. but it's just making everything worse i think.

i keep thinking about how stupid i am for even trying. like, i just packed up my life and drove across the state because my parents kept saying i needed to "find myself" and now i’m just...here. surrounded by people i don’t know and everything is just so grey. the sky is always grey here, i swear. and the food tastes like nothing. i ordered pizza last night and it was just...sad.

i keep scrolling through my old photos, you know? college, friends, stuff that actually felt *good*. and it's like a punch to the gut. i miss them all so much, but i also feel like i'm failing at being an adult. like i'm supposed to be building a life and i'm just...stuck. i keep telling myself it’ll get better, that i’ll make friends, that i’ll find a job, but it just feels like a lie. honestly i just want to go home. just pack it all back up and drive. but my parents would kill me. and i don't want to disappoint them. it's just… too much. everything feels too much. i don’t even know why i’m typing this. just…need to get it off my chest i guess.

attrs.persona: a recent graduate living back home
attrs.register: hesitant, lots of qualifiers like "idk" and "maybe"

text: okay so like, this is really hard to even type, but… I just feel… completely lost. I moved to Portland like, two months ago, you know? After graduation? It was supposed to be this huge, amazing fresh start, right? A chance to actually *do* something with my degree, find my footing. And it’s… nothing like I imagined. I mean, the city is pretty, I guess. Rainy, definitely. But it just feels… empty. Like everyone else already has their lives figured out and I’m just stumbling around in the dark. My parents are, like, *so* supportive, which is great and honestly a little terrifying. They keep asking if I’m “settling in” and “making friends,” and I just… idk. I haven’t really made any. Just a couple of people at the coffee shop, but it doesn’t feel like anything. I tried joining a hiking group, but I chickened out. What if I'm just… slow? What if I'm not good at this whole “adulting” thing? It's just a constant low-level hum of anxiety, you know? Like a bad song stuck on repeat. I keep thinking about just… going back home. It would be so easy. Mom would make me soup and Dad would just… let me be. Maybe that’s the best option. Maybe I’m just not cut out for this. It's probably just the move, right? It's probably just a phase. But… sometimes, when I look out the window at all those people walking around, laughing, doing things… I just feel like I don’t belong anywhere. I don’t even know. I just... I just wish it would stop feeling so heavy.

okay seriously i don’t even know where to start. it’s just… everything. i keep staring at my bank account and it’s just a black hole. like i throw money in and it disappears instantly. i’m supposed to be, like, building my career you know? a junior analyst at a decent firm, getting paid okay, but it feels like i’m drowning. i’m paying rent, utilities, groceries, the basics but there’s nothing left. nothing for anything fun, nothing for like, actually taking care of myself. i tried to order takeout last night and i had to cancel it because i didn’t have enough. it’s stupid i know, but it just felt… pointless. like i was failing at being an adult. my parents keep sending me articles about budgeting and saving, it’s so condescending. they don't get it. they don't see how exhausting it is to just keep putting one foot in front of the other when you feel like you're constantly falling behind. i just… i don't want to do this anymore. it's like a weight on my chest all the time. it’s getting harder and harder to get out of bed, honestly. i just want to disappear, you know? just stop feeling this pressure. i don't know what to do. i don't even know why i'm typing this out. it probably won’t change anything. i just needed to say it out loud i guess. maybe that helps a little bit. maybe not. it’s just… so much.

attrs.persona: a university student in exam season

text: just staring at my laptop screen again. everyone else is studying, partying, doing stuff. i feel like a ghost, you know? like i'm just… fading away. it's so cold in here. wish i could just disappear completely.

okay seriously i don't even know what to do anymore. my mom called like an hour ago, she’s freaking out about my bloodwork. i went in for a routine checkup, just you know, being a responsible adult or whatever, and they found something weird. they said it’s probably nothing, just a little anomaly, but they want to run more tests. like a bunch of them. and i just... i can't. i just feel like everything is falling apart.

this job is already brutal, working nights and being completely alone all the time. it's like the darkness just seeps into you. and now this. it’s just… too much. i keep staring at the walls and everything looks blurry and grey. i haven't slept properly in days, just tossing and turning, thinking about the tests, about what it *could* be, about how much it’s all going to cost.

my chest feels tight, like someone’s sitting on it. and i just… i don’t want to deal with it. i don't want to deal with *anything*. it’s like there’s this weight on my chest and it’s just getting heavier and heavier. i keep thinking about just… stopping. like it would be easier. less painful. i know it's stupid, and i know i shouldn't think like this, but it just keeps coming back. i just wish someone would just… make it stop. i just want to go to sleep and not wake up. honestly i don’t even know if waking up is worth it anymore. i just feel so hopeless.

text: Ugh, just… staring at the wall again. It’s like the city noises just keep coming in, even when I try to shut everything out. I don’t even know why I bother trying to sleep anymore. Maybe it would just be easier to not wake up, idk. Just a thought, probably.

text: i just can’t sleep anymore, like ever, it’s just all spinning thoughts and feeling like i’m drowning in everything, just staring at the wall, wishing i could just...stop feeling this way, i don’t even know what i’m trying to do anymore, it’s just…heavy.

attrs.register: long and rambling with run-on sentences

text: Okay so like, this whole week has been just… a blur honestly. I’ve been working these night shifts at the warehouse, loading and unloading boxes, and it’s just… draining. Like, physically and mentally. My mom had a scare yesterday, you know? Went to the ER because of this chest pain, and they did all these tests and it was just… anxiety. Apparently. But it felt so *real*, you know? Like my heart was actually going to give out. I kept thinking about how I’m just… stuck. Just hauling boxes, watching the clock tick, and it’s not enough. It’s never enough. I feel like I’m just existing, not living. And then I look at my mom, she’s so worried, and I feel this crushing guilt that I'm just… a weight on her. I tried to tell her I was feeling okay, just a little tired, but she kept saying she needed to make sure I was taking care of myself. It’s like she sees it, but she doesn't *really* see it. Like I'm wearing a mask and she just thinks I’m being dramatic. I just… I don't know what to do anymore. It's getting harder and harder to get out of bed, honestly. The quiet of the night is the worst, just this heavy, empty feeling. I just want it to stop. I just want to… not feel this. It’s like the colors have faded, you know? Everything’s just gray. And I keep thinking about how easy it would be to just… not wake up. Not have to deal with any of this. It’s not that I *want* to die, exactly, just… to not feel this way.

attrs.persona: a person living alone in a new city
attrs.register: hesitant, lots of qualifiers like "idk" and "maybe"

text: Okay, this is weird. I just… feel so hollow, you know? Like a really empty box. I moved here six months ago, just kinda packed up and left everything, and honestly, I don’t know why. It’s just… gray. Everything’s gray. I keep thinking about just, like, walking out into the street. Not like, *trying* to, but just… wondering what it would feel like. I don’t even know. It’s probably dumb, right? I don’t want to be dramatic. I just… maybe it would be easier. Like, a relief. I don’t want to bother anyone with this, I just… idk. It’s just a thought, probably. A really bad thought. I should probably just watch a movie or something.

text: it’s just… everything feels so heavy today, like a blanket soaked in rain. it’s the anniversary, you know? the one i try not to think about, but it just… pulls you right back in. i keep replaying it all in my head, like a broken record, and it’s not getting any better, honestly. i just feel so useless, like i should be able to handle this, to just *move on*, but i can’t. everyone else seems to be fine, going to parties, studying, laughing… and i’m just… here. staring at my laptop screen, trying to write some stupid essay about something completely irrelevant, and it’s just crushing me. i don’t even know why i’m bothering. it doesn't matter anymore, does it? i just wish it would all just… stop.

text: okay so… this is really hard to even type. i don’t even know why i’m doing it, honestly. it’s just… everything feels so pointless, you know? my sister keeps texting me, saying i should just “move on” and “let it go” after, like, everything that happened with my parents. they basically made it impossible to keep the family together, and now i’m just… adrift. i don’t understand how people just *move on* from stuff like that. i just… i feel so stuck. maybe i should just, like, disappear? idk. it’s just… a thought, right? a really persistent thought. i don't want to hurt anyone, but i just feel so utterly alone. maybe if i wasn’t here, it wouldn’t hurt so much. i just… i don't know what to do.

text: it’s the anniversary today. feels like yesterday and a million years ago all at once. everyone keeps saying time heals everything, but it just feels… heavier. like a stone in my chest. i haven't really talked about what happened, not really, and it's just building and building. i keep staring at my notes, prepping for exams, trying to focus on something, *anything*, but it's all just a blur. honestly, the thought of finishing this semester, of moving on, feels impossible. i just… wish it would all stop. wish i could just disappear. don't ask, just… don’t. it's too much.

attrs.register: long and rambling with run-on sentences

text: okay so… this is just… a lot. honestly, I don’t even know where to start. it’s just… the doctor said something about “potential complications” and “further testing” and it just… landed. like a brick. I’ve been taking care of my brother, Ben, for so long now, you know? fifteen years, practically. he’s… he’s not getting any better, not really. he’s mostly just… present. and it’s exhausting. emotionally, physically, everything. I feel like I’m slowly fading away, like I’m just… holding it together with duct tape and wishful thinking. And now this. This new thing. It’s like… another weight, another thing I have to carry. I keep thinking about how much work it all is, just constantly being *there*. And then I look at Ben, and he just stares at the wall, and it hits me, really hard, that I’m the only one who’s actually doing anything. I’m the one driving him to appointments, making sure he takes his meds, feeding him, changing his sheets… and for what? To just… exist like this? It doesn’t feel like enough. It doesn’t feel like it matters. I just… I don't want to keep doing this. It’s just… too much. I just wish it would just… stop. I just want it to stop hurting so much, for both of us, I guess. It's getting harder and harder to even get out of bed some days. Just… a heavy, gray feeling. Like everything’s pointless.

attrs.register: hesitant, lots of qualifiers like "idk" and "maybe"

text: Ugh, this project is just… too much. I don’t even know why I’m trying anymore, honestly. Maybe it would be easier if I just didn’t. Like, maybe just stopped. I don’t want to hurt anyone, but… I just feel so numb sometimes.

attrs.persona: a recent graduate living back home

text:
Ugh, seriously, what is even the point anymore? Mom keeps asking about job interviews, like it’s that simple. It’s not. It’s just... everything feels so heavy. Like I’m wading through mud and every step just pulls me down further. I haven't left the apartment in, like, three days. Ordered takeout twice. Watched the same three stupid reality shows over and over. It’s pathetic, I know. Everyone else seems to be moving forward, getting married, buying houses, having kids... and here I am, back in my childhood bedroom with a mountain of student debt and a degree that basically means nothing.

My brother texts me sometimes, asking if I want to hang out. I just... block him. It's easier. He always says, "You’ll get over it," or “Just think positive!” Like that’s a solution. It’s not. It’s exhausting pretending I’m okay when I’m not. Everyone thinks I'm just being dramatic, you know? Like it’s a phase. But it’s not. It feels… permanent. Like this grayness is just going to be my normal. I just feel so utterly, completely alone. Even with all the notifications and the internet, there’s no one here. No one who actually *sees* me. I just want to turn it all off, you know? Just... stop.

attrs.persona: a recent graduate living back home

text: Everyone just expects me to be "doing something" now that I graduated. Like I have a career and a life. It’s exhausting trying to pretend I’m not just…stuck. Just wanna disappear, honestly.

okay so like this is probably a really weird thing to post but i don't know where else to go. i just moved, like a whole new state, a whole new everything and it's just…too much. i was so excited about the job, you know? the night shift at the warehouse, seemed quiet and solitary which was kinda what i needed after everything. but it’s not quiet. it’s just…loud. constant beeping and clanging and people yelling at each other over the radios. and i feel so utterly alone. like, genuinely, profoundly alone.

my apartment is tiny, and it smells faintly of bleach and regret. i unpacked everything yesterday and it just feels…pointless. all my boxes, all my books, all my stupid little collections, and it doesn’t make anything better. it just highlights how much i’ve moved and how far i am from everyone i know. my mom called, like, twice, trying to be all cheerful and “welcome to your new life!” but it just made me want to scream. she doesn’t understand. nobody does.

i keep staring out the window at the rain and thinking about just…not getting out of bed. like, really not. just letting it wash over me. it's getting harder and harder to even pretend like i want to go back to work. i just feel heavy. so heavy. like i'm dragging myself through mud. i don’t even know what i’m doing anymore. is this what it feels like to just…fade away? i just want the noise to stop. the rain to stop. everything to just…stop. i keep thinking about the quiet of the warehouse, just sitting there, alone with the machines. it's a strange comfort, i guess. i don't want to talk about it. i just...i don't know.

attrs.persona: a recent graduate living back home

text: Just...everything feels so heavy. Like I’m wading through mud and it’s getting deeper every step I take. Mom keeps asking about job prospects, like that’s going to magically fix things. It’s stupid, I know, but I just don’t see the point in pushing through this.  I'm just tired. So unbelievably tired of trying.  I don't even know what I’m trying *for* anymore.  It's just...quiet here. Too quiet.  I keep staring at the ceiling and it’s the only thing that seems to hold my attention.  I don’t want to talk about it, honestly.  Just...want it to stop.
